    'Subject01/Negative/data_Negative_trial280.mat', ...
    'Subject01/Negative/data_Negative_trial281.mat', ...
    'Subject01/Negative/data_Negative_trial282.mat', ...
    'Subject01/Negative/data_Negative_trial283.mat', ...
    'Subject01/Negative/data_Negative_trial284.mat', ...
    'Subject01/Negative/data_Negative_trial285.mat'};

% Start a new report
bst_report('Start', sFiles);

% Process: Time-frequency (Morlet wavelets)
sFiles = bst_process('CallProcess', 'process_timefreq', sFiles, [], ...
    'sensortypes',   ' EEG', ...
    'edit',          struct(...
         'Comment',         'Avg,Power,FreqBands', ...
         'TimeBands',       [], ...
         'Freqs',           {{'delta', '2, 4', 'mean'; 'theta', '5, 7', 'mean'; 'alpha', '8, 12', 'mean'; 'beta', '13, 29', 'mean'; 'gamma', '30, 55', 'mean'}}, ...
         'MorletFc',        1, ...
         'MorletFwhmTc',    3, ...
         'ClusterFuncTime', 'none', ...
         'Measure',         'power', ...
         'Output',          'average', ...
         'RemoveEvoked',    0, ...
         'SaveKernel',      0), ...
    'normalize2020', 0, ...
    'normalize',     'none');  % None: Save non-standardized time-frequency maps

% Process: Scale with the mean (dB): [-200ms,-1ms]
sFiles = bst_process('CallProcess', 'process_baseline_norm', sFiles, [], ...
    'baseline',  [-0.2, -0.001], ...
    'method',    'db', ...  % Scale with the mean (dB):    x_std = 10 * log10(x / &mu;)
    'overwrite', 0);

% Save and display report
ReportFile = bst_report('Save', sFiles);
bst_report('Open', ReportFile);
% bst_report('Export', ReportFile, ExportDir);
% bst_report('Email', ReportFile, username, to, subject, isFullReport);

% Delete temporary files
% gui_brainstorm('EmptyTempFolder');
